title: Daemon token authentication on WebSocket connect
description: Verify token-based auth on the WebSocket upgrade path

steps.action: Connect WebSocket to /cowork and send valid auth token as first message
steps.expected: Connection stays open, daemon proceeds to key exchange phase

steps.action: Connect WebSocket and send invalid auth token
steps.expected: Daemon closes WebSocket with code 4000 and reason 'Authentication failed'

steps.action: Connect WebSocket and send no message for 5 seconds
steps.expected: Daemon closes WebSocket with code 4000 (auth timeout)

steps.action: Connect WebSocket and send a non-auth message type first
Rotate token via POST /api/cowork/rotate-token, then connect with old token
steps.expected: Old token rejected (4000), new token accepted
